config.ji_afkcinematic.title: Ji AFK Cinematic — Settings
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.shot_dura: How long each cinematic shot will last before cutting to another.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.afk_thres: Time without input before the cinematic automatically starts.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.max_cycle: Maximum number of shots to show before returning to standard view.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.camera_sp: Multiplier for how fast the camera travels in each shot.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.damage_ac:
Selects the behavior when receiving damage:
§7Ignore: Continues undisturbed.
§eCancel Camera: Exits the cinematic.
§cPause Game: Halts the game immediately.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.letterbox: Enables cinematic black bars on the top and bottom of the screen.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.keybind:
Assign a hotkey to instantly open the settings menu.
§ePress ESC to clear the binding.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.ji-afk-ci: Immersive 4K cinematic camera system designed for AFK players.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.ji-afk-cinema: Immersive 4K cinematic camera system designed for AFK players.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.report: Report issues, provide feedback, or give recommendations.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.extended_:
Expands cinematic music variety.
§aON:§f Normal tracks + Music Discs.
§6OFF:§f Only normal tracks.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.enabled: Disables AFK cinematics if turned off. Keybinds remain active.
